canonical.title: 2026 festivals & cultural events: a Ghent-couple's calendar

parent.title: Date nights & weekend getaways for a Ghent couple — 2026 calendar

siblings.title: Live shows in 2026
siblings.summary: Confirmed May–December 2026 concerts, festivals, opera, musicals and weekend-getaway shows for a Ghent-based couple, with booking and dinner-pairing notes.

siblings.title: Immersive experiences and hands-on workshops
siblings.summary: Workshops, brewery tours and immersive shows worth booking for a couple in Ghent in 2026 — picks, prices, durations and dated events.

siblings.title: Spectator sports for date nights
siblings.summary: The Six Days of Ghent is the local date-night classic; KAA Gent fills the autumn-spring slot; the spring cobbled classics give you a free outdoor day.

siblings.title: Spa, wellness, and themed-stay weekends in Belgium
siblings.summary: A Ghent-anchored shortlist of thermal day-trips, full spa-hotel weekends, and themed nature stays — picked by drive time, vibe, and price.

siblings.title: Train-reachable city breaks from Ghent (BE/NL/FR/DE/LUX)
siblings.summary: 20+ cities ranked by train time, vibe, and best 2026 event windows — only Lille is direct from Ghent internationally; everything else routes via Brussels-Midi.

siblings.title: Outdoor adventures for couples
siblings.summary: Day trips, weekend escapes, and big-ticket adventures for a Ghent-based couple, ordered by season for 2026.

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Ghent Festivities
sources.claim: Gentse Feesten 2026 runs 17–26 July with free music, street theatre and parades

sources.title: Wikipedia — Gentse Feesten
sources.claim: Gentse Feesten draws ~2 million visitors; one of Europe's largest popular festivals

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Festivals & feasts
sources.claim: Patershol 14–16 Aug; Bijloke Wonderland 20–30 Aug; Film Fest Gent 7–18 Oct; Gent Jazz 3–18 Jul

sources.title: floralien.be
sources.claim: Floraliën Ghent 2026 runs 1–10 May at Floraliënhal, Kuipke and Botanical Garden

sources.title: gentsmaakt.be — Practical info
sources.claim: Gent Smaakt is a free five-day culinary festival, 13–17 May 2026

sources.title: polepole.be — Gentse Feesten 2026
sources.claim: Polé Polé runs alongside Gentse Feesten 17–26 July

sources.title: UCI — Lotto Zesdaagse Vlaanderen-Gent
sources.claim: Six Days of Ghent: 17–22 November 2026 at 't Kuipke

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Christmas Market
sources.claim: Ghent Christmas Market: 3 Dec 2026 – 3 Jan 2027, ~150 chalets, 44 m Ferris wheel

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Ghent Light Festival
sources.claim: Ghent Light Festival is triennial — no 2026 edition; next is 2027

sources.title: visitbruges.be — Procession of the Holy Blood 2026
sources.claim: Procession of the Holy Blood: Thu 14 May 2026, 14:30–17:30

sources.title: UNESCO ICH — Procession of the Holy Blood
sources.claim: UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage; ~1,700 participants and 30,000–45,000 spectators

sources.title: tripologiste.com — Cactusfestival
sources.claim: Cactusfestival Bruges 2026: 10–12 July at Minnewaterpark

sources.title: visitbruges.be — Bruges Beer Festival 2026
sources.claim: Bruges Beer Festival 18th edition: 12–13 September 2026

sources.title: visitbruges.be — Winter Glow
sources.claim: Bruges Winter Glow runs 20 Nov 2026 – 14 Feb 2027

sources.title: UNESCO ICH — Carnival of Binche
sources.claim: Binche Carnival is a UNESCO Masterpiece (2003 / inscribed 2008)

sources.title: travelbeginsat40.com — Binche Carnival
sources.claim: Binche Carnival 2026 takes place 15–17 February

sources.title: Wikipedia — Carnival of Aalst
sources.claim: Aalst Carnival: 3-day pre-Lent street parade with satirical floats; Tuesday 'Voil Jeanetten'

sources.title: UNESCO ICH — Aalst Carnival
sources.claim: Aalst Carnival inscribed on UNESCO ICH list (2010)

sources.title: brussels.be — Flower Carpet
sources.claim: Brussels Flower Carpet 2026: 13–16 August on the Grand Place; Japan honoured

sources.title: DJ Mag — Tomorrowland 2026
sources.claim: Tomorrowland 2026: 17–19 and 24–26 July in Boom

sources.title: musicfestivalwizard.com — Couleur Café 2026
sources.claim: Couleur Café 2026: 26–28 June at Osseghem Park, Brussels

sources.title: musicfestivalwizard.com — Pukkelpop 2026
sources.claim: Pukkelpop 2026: 20–23 August in Hasselt

sources.title: brusselsmusicagenda.com — Belgian summer festival guide
sources.claim: Rock Werchter 2 to 5 July 2026; Live is Live 27–29 June Antwerp

sources.title: keukenhof.nl
sources.claim: Keukenhof 2026: 19 March – 10 May, 7M bulbs, 800 tulip varieties

sources.title: braderiedelille.com
sources.claim: Braderie de Lille 2026: 5–6 September; ~100 km of stalls; 2–3 M visitors

sources.title: magischmaastrichtvrijthof.nl
sources.claim: Magisch Maastricht: rink + 45 m enclosed-gondola Ferris wheel on the Vrijthof

sources.title: colognecathedral.de — Christmas Market
sources.claim: Cologne Cathedral Christmas Market: 25 Nov – 23 Dec 2026, 150+ stalls

sources.title: laetare-stavelot.be
sources.claim: Stavelot Laetare carnival, mid-Lent — white-hooded Blancs Moussis

sources.title: visitantwerpen.be — Summer 2026
sources.claim: Zomer van Antwerpen: late June – August, free/low-cost theatre, circus, open-air cinema
